key.name: cursor-theme-light
key.summary: shell theme name for light mode
key.description: The name of the shell theme for light mode

key.name: icon-theme-light
key.summary: gtk3 theme name for light mode
key.description: The name of the gtk3 theme for light mode

key.name: shell-theme-light
key.summary: shell theme name for light mode
key.description: The name of the shell theme for light mode

key.name: gtk3-theme-light
key.summary: gtk3 theme name for light mode
key.description: The name of the gtk3 theme for light mode

key.name: cursor-theme-dark
key.summary: shell theme name for light mode
key.description: The name of the shell theme for light mode

key.name: icon-theme-dark
key.summary: gtk3 theme name for light mode
key.description: The name of the gtk3 theme for light mode

key.name: shell-theme-dark
key.summary: shell theme name for dark mode
key.description: The name of the shell theme for dark mode

key.name: gtk3-theme-dark
key.summary: gtk3 theme name for dark mode
key.description: The name of the gtk3 theme for dark mode

key.name: optimize-darklight-switch-transition
key.description: Optimize animation when toggling between light and dark modes.

key.name: run-custom-commands
key.summary: Whether to run custom commands on theme switch
key.description: If true, run custom shell commands when entering light or dark mode.

key.name: custom-command-light
key.summary: Custom command to run in light mode
key.description: The shell command to execute when switching to light mode.

key.name: custom-command-dark
key.summary: Custom command to run in dark mode
key.description: The shell command to execute when switching to dark mode.

key.name: sync-lockscreen-wallpaper
key.description: Whether to change the lockscreen wallpaper when the theme switches.

key.name: lockscreen-use-desktop-wallpaper
key.description: Whether to use the same wallpaper selected for the desktop on the lockscreen.

key.name: lockscreen-wallpaper-light
key.description: File path or URI for the lockscreen wallpaper in light mode.

key.name: lockscreen-wallpaper-dark
key.description: File path or URI for the lockscreen wallpaper in dark mode.

key.name: show-indicator
key.description: Show a status indicator icon in the system panel.

key.name: toggle-theme-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to toggle between light and dark modes.
